title: Applied Science and Technological Progress
summary: In institutions whose mission includes the application of research results to products or operations, the categorization of research into basic and applied has little operational value.
body: In institutions whose mission includes the application of research results to products or operations, the categorization of research into basic and applied has little operational value.
